welcome.title: OmniWallet
welcome.subtitle: Your gateway to 128 blockchains, the OmniBazaar marketplace, and the OmniCoin DEX. Trustless, gasless, and private by design.
welcome.signIn: Already have an account? Sign In
welcome.termsPrefix: By continuing you agree to the

createWallet.heading: Create Wallet
createWallet.passwordHint: Set a password to protect your wallet on this device. Your seed phrase is the true backup — keep it safe.
createWallet.seedWarning: ⚠️ Write these 12 words down and store them somewhere safe. Anyone with these words can access your wallet.
createWallet.confirmHint: Enter the words at positions {{positions}} to verify your backup.
createWallet.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

importWallet.heading: Import Wallet
importWallet.mnemonicHint: Enter your 12 or 24-word recovery phrase, separated by spaces.
importWallet.privateKeyHint: Enter your private key (hex, with or without 0x prefix).
importWallet.errorSeedWordCount: Seed phrase must be 12 or 24 words
importWallet.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

seedBackup.heading: Recovery Phrase
seedBackup.warning: ⚠️ Write these {{count}} words down and store them somewhere safe. Anyone with these words can access your wallet.
seedBackup.confirmHint: Enter the words at positions {{positions}} to verify your backup.

login.heading: Welcome Back
login.unlockAria: Unlock your wallet with the entered password
login.useDifferentAria: Import a different wallet or create a new one

asset.invalidDecimals: Token metadata is missing or invalid — balance hidden for safety
asset.invalidDecimalsAria: Balance unavailable — token metadata is invalid

activity.heading: Activity
activity.amountHidden: Amount hidden — tap Reveal to decrypt

send.heading: Send
send.errorInvalidAddress: Address format isn't valid for this chain. Please double-check and re-paste.
send.networkTooltip: Select the chain to send from. Each chain has its own balance.
send.gaslessTooltip: Gasless: this transaction is relayed through OmniRelay. You pay zero native gas.
send.recipientTooltip: Enter a valid address for the selected chain. Addresses are validated for shape and checksum.
send.maxTooltip: Fill the amount with your maximum {{symbol}} balance.
send.estimatedGasTooltip: Estimated network fee for this transaction.

receive.heading: Receive
receive.hint: Only send {{symbol}} and compatible tokens to this address on {{chainName}}.
receive.networkTooltip: Select the chain you want to receive on. Each chain has its own address.
receive.addressTooltip: Your {{chainName}} receive address. Anyone with this address can send you {{symbol}}.

home.heading: Settings
home.walletConnectSub: Pair with dApps via QR code
home.hardwareSub: Add a Ledger or Trezor account
home.participationSub: See how your {{score}}/100 score is calculated
home.antiPhishingSub: Choose a color and word to verify this is your wallet
home.tokenApprovalsSub: Review and revoke ERC-20 + NFT approvals

security.heading: Security & Privacy
security.exportedAlert: Private key copied to clipboard. Store it safely and clear your clipboard.
security.passwordChangeSub: Update the password used to unlock the wallet
security.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
security.biometricSub: Use Touch ID, Face ID, or Windows Hello to unlock
security.biometricUnavailable: Biometric unlock is not available on this device.
security.autoLockSub: Lock the wallet after a period of inactivity

networks.heading: Networks
networks.defaultChainSub: Shown in the popup account bar by default.

locale.heading: Language
locale.description: Choose the display language for the wallet. The change applies immediately.

tokenApprovals.title: Token Approvals
tokenApprovals.help: We are building a one-click view of every token approval your wallet has granted. You will be able to revoke approvals here at any time.

swap.noRoutes: No routes available for this pair
swap.xomRoutingNotice: XOM routes via OmniDEX → USDC before bridging
swap.priceImpactWarning: Price impact: {{pct}}% — you'll lose roughly {{loss}} {{symbol}} to market depth
swap.priceImpactHigh: High price impact ({{pct}}%). You may lose {{loss}} {{symbol}} to slippage. Confirm to proceed.
swap.priceImpactDangerous: Dangerous price impact ({{pct}}%). Type the confirmation phrase to unlock.
swap.priceImpactDisabledTooltip: Disabled: price impact too high. Confirm to proceed.
swap.slippageTooHigh: Setting slippage above 5% is unusually high and can be exploited by MEV bots.

limit.title: Limit order
limit.loginHint: Sign in to place limit orders

lp.title: Liquidity pools
lp.gasInfoTooltip: Adding liquidity to a new pool requires a 5,000,000 gas limit.
lp.tvlTooltip: Total value locked — the USD value of all liquidity in this pool.
lp.apyTooltip: Annualised yield estimated from the pool’s recent trading fees. Real yield fluctuates with volume.
lp.positionTooltip: Your current share of the pool expressed in LP tokens.
lp.addTooltip: Deposit both tokens to earn a share of trading fees.
lp.removeTooltip: Withdraw your share and stop earning fees from this pool.

safeOnboard.title: Set up private balance
safeOnboard.explain: Your private balance (pXOM) is encrypted on-chain via COTI V2. A one-time setup is required.

approveCollection.step: Step 1 of 2: Approve marketplace for this NFT collection
approveCollection.tooltip: One-time approval per NFT collection. OmniBazaar pays the gas.
approveCollection.success: Collection approved. You can now list NFTs from this collection.
approveCollection.notERC2771: This NFT collection doesn't support gasless approve — you'll need a small amount of XOM for gas.
approveCollection.mustApprove: Approve the marketplace for this collection before listing.

approveXom.step: Step 1 of 2: Approve {{amount}} XOM for this purchase
approveXom.rememberLabel: Remember approval for future XOM purchases on OmniBazaar
approveXom.rememberTooltip: Grants unlimited XOM spend to the marketplace. You can revoke anytime in Settings > Token Approvals.

error.selfReferral: Referrer cannot be you or the seller.
error.buyerIsSeller: You cannot buy your own listing.
error.duplicateReferrer: Second-level referrer cannot equal the primary referrer.
error.invalidAddress: One of the referrer addresses is invalid.
error.missingBuyer: Active wallet not set — unlock the wallet and retry.
error.missingSeller: Listing is missing a seller — please refresh and retry.
error.insufficientBalance: Not enough XOM in your wallet for this purchase.
error.settlementNotDeployed: NFT marketplace is being upgraded — please try again shortly.
error.noFloorListing: No listings are currently available for this collection.

nft.buyConfirm: Confirm purchase? XOM will be sent and the NFT transferred atomically on-chain.
nft.buyUnavailable: NFT purchases are not yet available — please check back soon.

listing.reportSubmitted: Report submitted. The arbitrator pool will review it.

create.heading: Create Listing
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the item, condition, and any shipping details
create.imagesHint: Drop images here or click to pick — up to 10, ≤ 5 MB each

referral.heading: Invite & Earn
referral.description: Earn 70% of the 0.50% referral fee on every purchase and DEX swap referred through your link.
referral.shareText: Sign up on OmniBazaar and get the welcome bonus.

rwa.kycComingSoon: KYC upgrade flows ship in Phase 5
rwa.connectHint: Connect a wallet to trade these assets
rwa.priceTooltip: Last recorded per-token price in USD.
rwa.mcapTooltip: Fully-diluted market cap — circulating supply × price.
rwa.apyTooltip: On-chain yield paid to holders over the last 30 days, annualised.
rwa.complianceTooltip: Regulatory regime this asset ships under; gates who can hold it.
rwa.tradeDisabledTooltip: Trading is gated by KYC and jurisdiction rules for this asset.

yield.empty: No yield opportunities match these filters

predictions.noPositions: No positions in this market yet
predictions.yesPriceTooltip: Current market price for YES shares. One YES share pays $1 if YES wins, $0 otherwise.
predictions.noPriceTooltip: Current market price for NO shares. One NO share pays $1 if NO wins, $0 otherwise.
predictions.volumeTooltip: Total trading volume over the last 24 hours in USD.
predictions.liquidityTooltip: Number of distinct traders — higher counts mean deeper liquidity.
predictions.resolutionTooltip: The market end date. YES/NO is decided by the configured oracle shortly after.

staking.heading: Staking
staking.earlyWarning: Early withdrawal penalty applies before lock expiry.

calculator.heading: Earnings estimator
calculator.intro: Rough annual earnings across staking, referrals, and marketplace activity. Figures ignore compounding and reward-pool caps.
calculator.disclaimer: Values scale with staking, referral, and first-sale curves that decrease as the user base grows. Not financial advice.

kyc.heading: KYC & Verification
kyc.alreadyAtMax: You have reached the maximum tier.
kyc.uploadHint: Upload a recent utility bill, bank statement, or official letter (PDF, JPEG, or PNG; ≤10 MB).
kyc.uploadFileTypeInvalid: Only PDF, JPEG, and PNG files are accepted.
kyc.personaHint: We use Persona to verify a government-issued ID and facial likeness. The flow opens in a new tab.
kyc.loginHint: Sign in to view your KYC status

bridge.heading: Bridge
bridge.noRoutes: No bridge route available for this pair

participation.heading: Participation Score
participation.intro: Your participation score combines nine factors capped at 100. A higher score unlocks validator and listing-node eligibility.
participation.loginHint: Sign in to view your participation score

components.disseminatorHint: 1 point per referred user, capped at 10.
components.forumParticipationHint: Decays over time; posts, replies, and likes.

governance.heading: Governance
governance.intro: ODDAO on-chain governance arrives after hard launch. Validators and XOM stakers will propose and vote on emissions, fee parameters, and treasury allocations.
governance.notes: Once live you will be able to vote from this screen. Until then, join the forum to share feedback.

portfolio.heading: Portfolio Analytics
portfolio.intro: ERC-20 balances across every EVM chain, batched in one Multicall3 request per chain.
portfolio.loginHint: Sign in to view your portfolio.
portfolio.partialError: {{count}} chain could not be read — showing partial results.
portfolio.partialError_other: {{count}} chains could not be read — showing partial results.

unknown.title: Something went wrong
unknown.body: We could not complete that action.
unknown.action: Try again in a moment. If the error repeats, restart the wallet.

network.title: Connection problem
network.body: Your wallet could not reach the internet or our validator.
network.action: Check your connection and tap retry.

session.title: Session expired
session.body: Your secure session is no longer valid.

notFound.title: Not found
notFound.body: The item you requested is no longer available.
notFound.action: Refresh the screen and try again.

rateLimit.title: Too many requests
rateLimit.body: You are going faster than our limits allow.
rateLimit.action: Wait about a minute, then retry.

serverDown.title: Service temporarily unavailable
serverDown.body: Our servers are unreachable right now.
serverDown.action: We retry automatically — leave this screen open.

locked.title: Wallet is locked
locked.body: This action requires your unlocked wallet.
locked.action: Unlock the wallet and try again.

insufficient.title: Not enough balance
insufficient.body: Your balance on this chain is too low for the requested action.
insufficient.action: Receive or swap more before retrying.

validation.title: Check your input
validation.body: The request was rejected because one of the fields is not valid.
validation.action: Review the form and try again.

connect.heading: Connect to dApp
connect.intro: {{origin}} wants to connect to your wallet.
connect.permissionsLabel: This site will be able to:
connect.permissionSign: Request signatures and transactions (each one needs your approval)

sign.heading: Signature request
sign.legacyWarning: ⚠️ This site is using the legacy eth_sign method, which can be misused to sign transactions. Reject if you are unsure.

tx.heading: Confirm transaction
tx.ackHighRisk: I understand this transaction looks risky and want to proceed anyway.

reason.scamAddress: Recipient is on a known scam blocklist.
reason.approvalForAll: Grants approval for all NFTs in this collection.
reason.transferFrom: Pulls tokens via a pre-existing allowance.

addchain.heading: Add network
addchain.collisionWarning: ⚠️ This dApp is trying to add a chain with the same ID ({{chainId}}) as {{knownName}}, but with a DIFFERENT {{fields}}. This could be a phishing attempt. Use the original {{knownName}} configuration instead.
addchain.iUnderstandRisk: I understand the risk and want to add this chain anyway
addchain.forceApproveDisabledTooltip: Disabled: confirm you understand the risk to continue.

walletconnect.heading: WalletConnect
walletconnect.intro: Scan a WalletConnect QR with your phone, copy the wc: URI, and paste it here to pair.
walletconnect.pairOk: Paired. Waiting for the dApp to send a session proposal.

education.body: OmniWallet supports EIP-6963 — it appears in any modern dApp's wallet picker. For legacy dApps that only show "Connect MetaMask", look for OmniWallet in the list, or use WalletConnect.

risk.explanation: No risky patterns detected. Always verify the recipient and amount.

dapp.originTooltip: The website that is asking for this approval.
dapp.rejectAria: Reject this request and close the popup
dapp.embeddedFrameTooltip: This request is coming from an iframe embedded inside another site. Approve only if you trust both the dApp AND the parent site.
dapp.embeddedFrame: This request comes from an embedded iframe, not the top-level page.

connect.noDevice: No device detected. Plug it in and try again.
connect.denied: Device access denied. Please allow access in your browser.

sign.title: Confirm on {{device}}
sign.subtitle: Review and confirm the transaction on your device

antiPhishing.stepHelp: Pick a color and a short word. OmniWallet will show them under the header every time you open the popup. A fake wallet cannot know your choice, so if you do not see your color and word, the popup is not the real OmniWallet.
antiPhishing.wordRules: Letters, digits, and spaces only. {{min}}–{{max}} characters.
antiPhishing.previewAria: Live preview of your anti-phishing banner
antiPhishing.changeRequiresPassword: Enter your password to save the change
antiPhishing.bannerTooltip: This is your anti-phishing marker. If you don't see YOUR color and word here, this is NOT the real OmniWallet.
antiPhishing.addPromptAria: Add an anti-phishing banner — opens the settings page
antiPhishing.errWordChars: Only letters, digits, and spaces are allowed.
antiPhishing.errSanitized: Please fix the banner fields before saving.
antiPhishing.errPasswordRequired: Enter your wallet password to save the change.
antiPhishing.errGeneric: Could not save the anti-phishing banner. Please try again.

send.minAmountError: Minimum send on Cardano is 1 ADA. Raise the amount and try again.
send.insufficientUtxo: Available UTXOs do not cover amount plus fee. Add more ADA to the sending wallet.
send.ttlExpired: This transaction expired before we could send it. Refresh and try again.
send.broadcastFailed: Could not submit the Cardano transaction. Please try again.

claim.insufficientGasBody: Claiming winnings on {{chain}} requires {{symbol}} for gas. Bridge XOM here to cover the transaction fee, then try again.
claim.failed: Could not claim winnings. Please try again.
claim.disabledTooltip: This market has not resolved yet. Claim will be available once the outcome is finalized.
